hour: noun. A unit of time of one twenty-fourth of a day (sixty minutes).
mho: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Mashi.
moo: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Monom.
mos: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Mooré.
mus: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Creek.
mush: noun. A somewhat liquid mess, often of food; a soft or semisolid substance.
oho: interjection. Expressing surprise or gloating realisation; aha.
oohs: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of ooh
ors: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Orang Seletar.
rho: noun. The seventeenth letter of the Modern Greek and Classical alphabets and the nineteenth letter of Old and Ancient.
rum: symbol. ISO 639-2 /B language code for Romanian.
shoo: verb. To induce someone or something to leave.
sou: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Southern Thai.
